name: max-vscode
description: Max local-first AI in your editor — DSL commands (. .. ~ + sigils), inline replace, and ghost-text completion.

commands.title: Max: Run command at cursor / selection

max.engineUrl.description: Base URL of the local Max engine (the desktop app runs it on 8001; dev uvicorn uses 8000).

enumDescriptions: Fire automatically when you type a command's closing delimiter (the keybinding still works too).
Only run via the keybinding / command palette.
max.trigger.description: How a DSL command (. … ., .. … .., ~ … ~) fires in the editor.

max.autocomplete.description: Ghost-text fill-in-the-middle completion as you type.

max.completionDelayMs.description: Idle delay before requesting a ghost-text completion.

max.maxCompletionTokens.description: Max tokens for a ghost-text completion (keep small for snappy suggestions).
